Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: While the Tu-95RT is beginning its search in the north, let's shift to our other search assets. One of our ships, the Sovremenny-class destroyer Osmotritelny, carries a Ka-27PL helicopter.

These helicopters can be used for anti-submarine warfare or as airborne radar platforms similar to the US SH-2F. Use the Flight Deck controls to launch the Ka-27PL helo with the Empty loadout (for max range), then order it to 16,000' with radars turned on to begin their own search.
